Document:
# Bartending, Drinks, and Other Liquids
Below is a list of all drink reagents and reactions you can find in Nuclear 14. They are roughly sorted by base reagents, then reactions and products. They are classified by their primary component.
## Animal Products
Milk from domesticated wasteland animals. A rare and valuable source of nutrition.
## Water and Base Liquids
Water is the most essential liquid in the Wasteland. Always purify water before drinking — dirty and irradiated water can make you sick.
## Plant Extracts
Plant extracts obtained by grinding or pressing plant products. Used in cooking, crafting, and as drink ingredients.
## Plant Drinks, Teas, and Infusions
Teas brewed from wasteland plants. Many have mild medicinal or nutritional properties.
## Carbonated Drinks
Nuka-Cola and other pre-war carbonated beverages. Highly sought after throughout the Wasteland.
## Alcohol
Alcoholic beverages brewed and distilled throughout the Wasteland.
